2026-04-14T00:00:52.6208411Z hint: 'development'. The just-created branch can be renamed via this command:
2026-04-14T00:00:52.6209079Z hint:
2026-04-14T00:00:52.6209800Z hint: 	git branch -m <name>

2026-04-14T00:00:55.2197908Z [hash-debug] Frontmatter text (2075 chars):
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2198769Z ---
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2199320Z description: |
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2238644Z   Documentation gap detector for the Azure SDK repository
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2239663Z   Triggered on every push to main, analyzes diffs to identify documentation
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2240591Z   gaps and files GitHub issues for Copilot coding agent to implement
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2241121Z 
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2241281Z on:
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2243619Z   push:
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2245807Z     branches: [main]
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2246283Z   workflow_dispatch:
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2246553Z 
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2246755Z permissions: read-all
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2247025Z 
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2247202Z network: defaults
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2247958Z 
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2248145Z safe-outputs:
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2248585Z   report-failure-as-issue: false
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2249090Z   create-issue:
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2249490Z     max: 1
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2250289Z   noop:
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2250691Z     report-as-issue: false
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2251155Z   jobs:
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2251527Z     dispatch_triage:
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2252229Z       description: "Dispatch the issue triage workflow for the newly created issue"
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2253888Z       runs-on: ubuntu-latest
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2254388Z       needs: safe_outputs
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2254885Z       output: "Triage workflow dispatched"
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2256625Z       permissions:
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2257062Z         actions: write
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2257478Z         issues: write
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2257896Z       steps:
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2258347Z         - name: Dispatch triage workflow
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2258909Z           uses: actions/github-script@v9
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2259423Z           env:
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2260063Z             CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER: "${{ needs.safe_outputs.outputs.created_issue_number }}"
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2260843Z           with:
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2261233Z             script: |
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2261770Z               const issueNumber = process.env.CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER;
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2262484Z               if (!issueNumber || issueNumber === '') {
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2263230Z                 core.info('No issue was created; skipping triage dispatch');
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2357844Z                 return;
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2358611Z               }
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2358868Z 
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2359429Z               const issueNum = parseInt(issueNumber, 10);
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2360380Z               const repo = { owner: context.repo.owner, repo: context.repo.repo };
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2360962Z 
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2361449Z               const { data: issue } = await github.rest.issues.get({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum });
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2362405Z               if (issue.labels && issue.labels.length > 0) {
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2363315Z                 await github.rest.issues.setLabels({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum, labels: [] });
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2364316Z                 core.info(`Removed all labels from issue #${issueNum}`);
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2364976Z               }
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2410277Z 
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2410916Z               await github.rest.actions.createWorkflowDispatch({
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2411836Z                 ...repo,
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2412349Z                 workflow_id: 'issue-triage.lock.yml',
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2412935Z                 ref: 'main',
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2413472Z                 inputs: { issue_number: issueNumber }
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2414025Z               });

2026-04-14T00:00:55.2425696Z 
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2425873Z safe-outputs:
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2426301Z   report-failure-as-issue: false
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2426797Z   create-issue:
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2427806Z     max: 1
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2428203Z   noop:
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2428600Z     report-as-issue: false
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2429044Z   jobs:
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2429413Z     dispatch_triage:
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2430093Z       description: "Dispatch the issue triage workflow for the newly created issue"
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2430881Z       runs-on: ubuntu-latest
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2431366Z       needs: safe_outputs
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2431860Z       output: "Triage workflow dispatched"
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2432390Z       permissions:
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2433676Z         actions: write
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2434150Z         issues: write
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2434584Z       steps:
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2435023Z         - name: Dispatch triage workflow
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2435847Z           uses: actions/github-script@v9
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2436378Z           env:
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2437030Z             CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER: "${{ needs.safe_outputs.outputs.created_issue_number }}"
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2437815Z           with:
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2438313Z             script: |
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2438886Z               const issueNumber = process.env.CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER;
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2440156Z               if (!issueNumber || issueNumber === '') {
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2440942Z                 core.info('No issue was created; skipping triage dispatch');
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2441837Z                 return;
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2442270Z               }
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2442501Z 
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2442752Z               const issueNum = parseInt(issueNumber, 10);
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2443651Z               const repo = { owner: context.repo.owner, repo: context.repo.repo };
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2444198Z 
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2444694Z               const { data: issue } = await github.rest.issues.get({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum });
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2445850Z               if (issue.labels && issue.labels.length > 0) {
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2446785Z                 await github.rest.issues.setLabels({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum, labels: [] });
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2447882Z                 core.info(`Removed all labels from issue #${issueNum}`);
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2449060Z               }
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2449354Z 
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2449666Z               await github.rest.actions.createWorkflowDispatch({
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2450364Z                 ...repo,
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2450871Z                 workflow_id: 'issue-triage.lock.yml',
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2454811Z                 ref: 'main',
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2455710Z                 inputs: { issue_number: issueNumber }
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2456859Z               });
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2457533Z               core.info(`Dispatched triage for issue #${issueNum}`);
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2458021Z 
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2458191Z tools:
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2458565Z   web-fetch:
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2459376Z   github:
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2459777Z     toolsets: [issues, repos]
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2460085Z

2026-04-14T00:00:55.2460904Z [hash-debug] No template expressions (env./vars.) found in markdown body
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2462670Z [hash-debug] Canonical JSON (2168 chars):
2026-04-14T00:00:55.2474381Z {"frontmatter-text":"description: |\n  Documentation gap detector for the Azure SDK repository\n  Triggered on every push to main, analyzes diffs to identify documentation\n  gaps and files GitHub issues for Copilot coding agent to implement\n\non:\n  push:\n    branches: [main]\n  workflow_dispatch:\n\npermissions: read-all\n\nnetwork: defaults\n\nsafe-outputs:\n  report-failure-as-issue: false\n  create-issue:\n    max: 1\n  noop:\n    report-as-issue: false\n  jobs:\n    dispatch_triage:\n      description: \"Dispatch the issue triage workflow for the newly created issue\"\n      runs-on: ubuntu-latest\n      needs: safe_outputs\n      output: \"Triage workflow dispatched\"\n      permissions:\n        actions: write\n        issues: write\n      steps:\n        - name: Dispatch triage workflow\n          uses: actions/github-script@v9\n          env:\n            CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER: \"${{ needs.safe_outputs.outputs.created_issue_number }}\"\n          with:\n            script: |\n              const issueNumber = process.env.CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER;\n              if (!issueNumber || issueNumber === '') {\n                core.info('No issue was created; skipping triage dispatch');\n                return;\n              }\n\n              const issueNum = parseInt(issueNumber, 10);\n              const repo = { owner: context.repo.owner, repo: context.repo.repo };\n\n              const { data: issue } = await github.rest.issues.get({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum });\n              if (issue.labels && issue.labels.length > 0) {\n                await github.rest.issues.setLabels({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum, labels: [] });\n                core.info(`Removed all labels from issue #${issueNum}`);\n              }\n\n              await github.rest.actions.createWorkflowDispatch({\n                ...repo,\n                workflow_id: 'issue-triage.lock.yml',\n                ref: 'main',\n                inputs: { issue_number: issueNumber }\n              });\n              core.info(`Dispatched triage for issue #${issueNum}`);\n\ntools:\n  web-fetch:\n  github:\n    toolsets: [issues, repos]\n\ntimeout-minutes: 15"}
